queries.allDocuments: TABLE type, status, version, lastUpdated, author, weight, ai-confidence FROM .memory/ SORT lastUpdated DESC
queries.activeProjects: TABLE version, lastUpdated, author FROM .memory/projects/ WHERE status = "active" SORT weight DESC
queries.concepts: TABLE version, author, ai-confidence FROM .memory/concepts/ WHERE type = "concept" SORT ai-confidence DESC
queries.glossary: TABLE version, lastUpdated FROM .memory/glossary/ SORT title ASC
queries.decisions: TABLE version, author, weight FROM .memory/decisions/ WHERE status = "active" SORT weight DESC
queries.diagrams: TABLE version, lastUpdated FROM .memory/diagrams/ WHERE type = "diagram"
queries.systemState: TABLE version, status, lastUpdated FROM .memory/system/ WHERE status = "active" SORT lastUpdated DESC
queries.samples: TABLE version, author, weight FROM .memory/samples/ WHERE type = "sample" SORT weight DESC
queries.extensions: TABLE version, lastUpdated, author FROM .memory/extensions/ WHERE status = "active"
queries.applications: TABLE version, author, accessibility FROM .memory/applications/ WHERE accessibility = "public" SORT weight DESC
